-- Fix the MTAV.TA trade: correct exitPrice, realizedPnl, realizedPnlPct
UPDATE paperTrades 
SET 
  exitPrice = 43.7340,
  realizedPnl = -947.93,
  realizedPnlPct = -19.09
WHERE id = 30002;

-- Fix availableCash: correct value is $5,971.04
UPDATE paperLedger SET availableCash = 5971.04 WHERE userId = 1;
